title: Trouble screen, User Guide
scenario: User Guide button on Onboarding "Having trouble" screen does not open the device's user guide web page
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. On the Onboarding screen, locate and tap the "Having trouble?" link or button.
4. On the "Having trouble" screen, tap the "User Guide" button.
expected: The device's user guide web page opens in the device's default web browser.
